products.name: ESD Anti-Fatigue Mat
products.description: ESD Anti-Fatigue Mats provide reliable static control while reducing fatigue caused by prolonged standing. Designed for ESD-sensitive environments, they offer ergonomic comfort, improved safety, and long-lasting durability for electronics manufacturing, assembly, testing, and repair workstations.

products.name: ESD Rubber Mat — Green
products.description: ESD Rubber Mat provides reliable static protection for electronics workstations, assembly lines, laboratories, and repair benches. Its durable rubber construction ensures effective static control, long-lasting performance, and a safer environment for handling sensitive electronic components.

products.name: ESD safe Floor Cleaner
products.description: ESD Floor Cleaner is a specially formulated cleaning solution designed for conductive and dissipative ESD flooring systems. It effectively removes dirt, dust, grease, and contaminants while preserving the electrical properties of ESD floors. Regular use helps maintain a clean, safe, and static-controlled environment. The non-residue formula ensures consistent floor conductivity without leaving insulating deposits that may interfere with ESD protection. Suitable for routine maintenance of ESD vinyl, epoxy, rubber, and other anti-static floor surfaces.
specs: Storage: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight

products.name: ESD safe mat & tabletop cleaner
products.description: Mat & Tabletop Cleaner is a specially formulated anti-static cleaning solution designed for ESD workstations, table mats, floor mats, and other static-control surfaces. It effectively removes dirt, grease, flux residues, fingerprints, and contaminants while maintaining the electrical properties of ESD protective surfaces. The cleaner leaves no insulating residue and helps preserve the performance of anti-static mats and workstations. Regular use helps extend the life of ESD mats and ensures a clean, compliant, and static-safe work environment.

products.name: ESD Floor Marking Tape — Yellow
products.description: High-visibility ESD floor tape for lane and hazard marking in cleanrooms. Pressure-sensitive adhesive for clean removal.

products.name: ESD Floor Marking Tape — Black
products.description: Durable black ESD marking tape. Withstands forklift and foot traffic in industrial environments.

products.name: ESD Dotted Gloves
products.description: ESD Dotted Gloves provide reliable static protection while offering enhanced grip for handling electronic components, PCBs, tools, and materials. Designed for comfort, durability, and precision, they are ideal for electronics manufacturing, assembly, inspection, and repair applications.

products.name: ESD Anti-Static Finger Cots
products.description:
ESD Anti-Static Finger Cots are designed to protect sensitive electronic components from electrostatic discharge, contamination, fingerprints, oils, and moisture during handling and assembly processes. Made from high-quality anti-static latex, these finger cots provide excellent flexibility, comfort, and tactile sensitivity, allowing users to perform precision tasks without compromising component safety.

Ideal for electronics manufacturing, PCB assembly, semiconductor handling, laboratory work, cleanroom environments, quality inspection, and repair applications, these finger cots offer a secure fit and reliable ESD protection for individual fingers while maintaining maximum dexterity.

products.name: ESD Palm Fit PU Coated gloves
products.description: ESD Palm Fit PU Coated Gloves provide reliable static protection combined with enhanced grip and excellent dexterity. The PU-coated palm ensures secure handling of electronic components and PCBs, making these gloves ideal for electronics manufacturing, assembly, inspection, and repair applications.

products.name: ESD Safety Shoes
products.description: Steel-toe ESD safety shoes meeting EN ISO 20345 S1P standards. Anti-static sole grounding the wearer through certified pathways.

products.name: ESD Slippers
products.description: Lightweight ESD cleanroom slippers for operators use. Easy-slip design for rapid changeover at entry points.

products.name: ESD Lab Coat
products.description: Grid-knit polyester ESD lab coat with conductive carbon filament grid. Compliant with IEC 61340-5-1.

products.name: ESD Wrist Strap
products.description: Adjustable fabric wrist strap with coil cord for continuous operator grounding at seated workstations.

products.name: Ground Monitor — Dual Port
products.description: Continuous wrist strap and footwear monitor with dual ports. Audible and visual alarm on grounding failure.

products.name: ESD Component Tray
products.description: Stackable ESD component trays for safe storage and transport of sensitive PCBs and ICs.

products.name: ESD Storage Bin
products.description: Open-front ESD bins for parts shelving in cleanroom and ESD-protected areas.

products.name: ESD Shielding Bag
products.description: Metallised multi-layer shielding bags for transport and storage of ESDS devices. Meets MIL-PRF-81705E.

products.name: ESD Pink Poly Bag
products.description: Anti-static pink poly bags for non-shielding applications. Reduces tribocharging during handling.

products.name: ESD Workshop Trolley
products.description: Three-shelf conductive trolley for moving PCBs and assemblies within ESD-protected areas.

products.name: Polyester Cleanroom Wipe
products.description: 100% continuous-filament polyester wipes for ISO Class 4–7 cleanrooms. Ultra-low particle and ion extractables.

products.name: Cleanroom Foam Wipe
products.description: Open-cell polyurethane foam wipes ideal for controlled solvent application on sensitive surfaces.

products.name: Nitrile Cleanroom Gloves
products.description: Powder-free nitrile gloves with low particle and endotoxin levels for semiconductor and pharma cleanrooms.

products.name: Cleanroom Coverall
products.description: Full-body ISO-rated coverall with integrated hood. Minimises particle shed in critical environments.

products.name: Cleanroom Bouffant Cap
products.description: Lightweight disposable bouffant caps for hair and particle containment. Latex-free.
